specific_question: What was the annual spend on office furniture by MediConn Solutions in 2024?
answer: The annual spend on office furniture by MediConn Solutions was 140,000 CAD in 2024.
justification: Office furniture expenses are unrelated to CPPA data privacy or compliance readiness.
dr_question: As the CPPA Act (Bill C-27) awaits parliamentary decision, how can MediConn build preparedness measures to ensure a smooth transition in the event the Act comes into effect by Q2 2026?
